_comment: Shared, character-independent expression vocabulary. Keys are the emoji allow-list exposed by set_expression(). Each entry maps an emoji to prompt fragments appended to a preset's base positive/negative prompts, plus an optional 'denoise' override. A preset may override any field via its own 'expression_overrides'. CLIP cannot read emoji, so this mapping to natural language is what actually reaches the sampler. Positive fragments follow a fixed recipe: one leading emotion gestalt word (checkpoints have strong learned associations for these), then 3-5 concrete FACS-style facial cues (brow position, eyelid tension, lip corners, mouth aperture) so the sampler is told exactly which features to move instead of having to infer them from the emotion word alone.
_denoise_note: Denoise is tuned to how much the reference image's geometry has to change to render the expression, not to how emotionally 'intense' it is. Closed-mouth, subtle-muscle expressions (neutral, content, smirk) get the lowest denoise so identity stays locked. Anything that opens the mouth or widens the eyes (surprised, shocked, sobbing) needs a higher budget. Emoji that introduce features not present in the reference face at all - cat ears/whiskers, sunglasses, party hats - get the highest denoise, since adding new geometry is the biggest departure from the reference.
_additive_emoji_limitation: The cat-face emoji and other 'additive' expressions (😎 sunglasses, 🥳 party hat, 😇 halo, 😈 horns) are known to under-render on a photoreal human preset: even at denoise 0.90 the base identity prompt (e.g. 'portrait of a cheerful man...') keeps winning, so no cat ears/whiskers/shades actually appear. This isn't a denoise problem, it's the appended-fragment architecture fighting a base prompt that describes a specific kind of face. The fix isn't more denoise, it's giving these expressions their own reference image (e.g. an actual cat-eared version of the character) so the reference and the prompt agree on what's being rendered, instead of fighting each other from one shared human reference. Left in the vocabulary as-is because the mapping is correct and will render properly on presets set up that way, or once per-expression reference images are supported.

😊.label: smile
😊.positive: warm genuine smile, lip corners pulled up, cheeks raised, lower eyelids pushed up, crow's feet crinkles

🙂.label: slight smile
🙂.positive: faint closed-mouth smile, lip corners gently upturned, relaxed brows, smooth forehead, soft neutral eyes

😃.label: grin
😃.positive: big cheerful grin, mouth open showing upper teeth, cheeks raised high, eyes wide and bright, raised eyebrows

😀.label: grinning
😀.positive: wide open grin, both rows of teeth showing, lip corners stretched up and out, raised cheeks, crinkled lower eyelids

😁.label: beaming
😁.positive: beaming smile, clenched teeth bared in a wide grin, jaw closed, cheeks bunched high, eyes narrowed to happy crescents

😆.label: squint laugh
😆.positive: hard laughter, eyes squeezed completely shut, brows relaxed, mouth wide open grinning, cheeks raised, head slightly back

😂.label: laughing
😂.positive: joyful laughter, eyes crinkled shut with tears at the corners, deep smile folds, mouth open wide, raised cheeks

🤣.label: rofl
🤣.positive: uncontrollable howling laughter, head thrown back, eyes shut tight, mouth stretched wide open, all teeth showing, cheeks bunched

😅.label: nervous laugh
😅.positive: awkward nervous smile, tense stretched grin, raised eyebrows, a bead of sweat on the brow, apologetic eyes

😌.label: content
😌.positive: serene contentment, eyes gently closed, smooth relaxed brow, soft closed-lip smile, slack peaceful facial muscles

😇.label: innocent
😇.positive: innocent angelic look, glowing halo above the head, eyebrows raised high, wide guileless eyes, small demure closed smile

🥰.label: loving
🥰.positive: adoring loving gaze, lower eyelids raised, soft half-lidded eyes, gentle raised brows, tender closed-lip half smile, relaxed jaw

😍.label: heart eyes
😍.positive: smitten adoration, sparkling wide eyes, raised eyebrows, lower eyelids pushed up, big open smile, cheeks flushed and raised

🤩.label: star-struck
🤩.positive: star-struck awe, eyes huge and gleaming, brows arched high, jaw dropped into a delighted open grin, raised cheeks

😎.label: cool
😎.positive: cool relaxed confidence, dark sunglasses over the eyes, easy lopsided closed smile, level brows, loose jaw

🥳.label: partying
🥳.positive: celebratory glee, cone party hat, mouth open cheering, eyebrows high, eyes bright and wide, confetti in the air

😉.label: wink
😉.positive: playful wink, one eye fully closed, other eye bright and open, one brow arched, lopsided knowing half smile

😘.label: blowing kiss
😘.positive: blowing a kiss, lips puckered forward, one eye winked shut, other brow raised, cheeks softly raised
😘.negative: wide open mouth, both eyes open

😗.label: kissing
😗.positive: gentle kissing face, lips pursed and pushed forward, eyes open and calm, neutral relaxed brows, smooth cheeks

😋.label: yum
😋.positive: savoring delight, tongue tip licking the upper lip, eyes closed in pleasure, raised cheeks, brows relaxed

😛.label: tongue out
😛.positive: cheeky teasing face, tongue stuck straight out over the lower lip, eyes wide and playful, eyebrows raised

😜.label: wink tongue
😜.positive: zany teasing wink, tongue lolling out sideways, one eye squeezed shut, opposite brow high, crooked grin

🤪.label: zany
🤪.positive: unhinged goofy face, eyes pointing different directions with one wide and one squinted, tongue hanging out, eyebrows at uneven heights, wild crooked grin

😏.label: smirk
😏.positive: sly knowing smirk, one lip corner pulled up asymmetrically, one eyebrow arched, half-lidded sidelong eyes, dimple on the smirking side

😈.label: mischievous
😈.positive: mischievous devilish grin, small horns on the forehead, brows angled sharply down and inward, narrowed gleaming eyes, wide grin showing teeth, dimples

🤓.label: nerdy
🤓.positive: earnest nerdy look, thick round glasses, eyebrows raised eagerly, buck-toothed overbite smile, wide keen eyes

😐.label: neutral
😐.positive: flat neutral expression, level relaxed brows, eyes open and unfocused, lips together in a straight horizontal line, slack cheeks

😑.label: expressionless
😑.positive: deadpan blank face, eyelids half lowered, brows perfectly flat, mouth a thin pressed line, total facial stillness

🤨.label: skeptical
🤨.positive: skeptical scrutiny, one eyebrow cocked high, the other flat, eyes slightly narrowed, mouth flat with one corner tucked

🙄.label: eye roll
🙄.positive: exasperated eye roll, both eyes rotated up showing white below the iris, brows raised, lips flattened and pressed, slight head tilt

😒.label: unamused
😒.positive: unamused sidelong stare, hooded half-lowered eyelids, flat brows, lips pressed with corners pulled slightly down, cheek slack

😬.label: grimace
😬.positive: awkward cringing grimace, teeth clenched and fully bared, lips stretched wide and thin, neck tendons taut, wincing narrowed eyes

🤔.label: thinking
🤔.positive: pensive concentration, brows drawn together and slightly lowered, eyes narrowed and looking up to one side, lips pursed to the side

🙁.label: slight frown
🙁.positive: mild unhappiness, lip corners turned faintly down, inner brows a touch raised, eyes soft, chin slightly tightened

😕.label: confused
😕.positive: puzzled confusion, brows uneven with one drawn down, eyes searching, mouth a small skewed frown pulled to one side

😟.label: worried
😟.positive: worried concern, inner brow corners pulled up and together, forehead furrowed in the middle, eyes wide and fixed, lip corners drawn down

😔.label: disappointed
😔.positive: quiet disappointment, gaze cast down, upper eyelids drooping, inner brows raised, lips together with corners sagging, head bowed slightly

😣.label: persevering
😣.positive: strained perseverance, eyes scrunched shut, brows knotted tightly together, mouth pressed into a hard line, jaw set, face braced

😖.label: confounded
😖.positive: confounded distress, whole face scrunched inward, eyes squeezed shut, brows twisted together, teeth gritted with lips pulled back

😢.label: sad
😢.positive: quiet sadness, single tear on the cheek, inner brow corners raised in an oblique slant, glistening eyes, downturned lip corners, chin puckered

😭.label: sobbing
😭.positive: open sobbing, streams of tears down both cheeks, eyes swollen shut, brows knotted upward, mouth wide open and wailing, flushed face

🥺.label: pleading
🥺.positive: pleading puppy-dog look, eyes huge and glistening looking up, inner brows raised high, lower lip pushed up in a quivering pout, chin crumpled

😓.label: downcast
😓.positive: deflated dismay, sweat drop on the temple, eyes down and dulled, brows slanted up at the inner corners, mouth tight and downturned

😩.label: weary
😩.positive: weary despair, eyes half shut and rolled slightly up, brows arched helplessly, mouth open in a drawn-out groan, face sagging

😫.label: tired
😫.positive: utter exhaustion, eyes clamped shut, brows pinched together, mouth stretched open in a groan, deep nasolabial folds, head drooping

😠.label: angry
😠.positive: hard anger, brows pulled down and together with vertical furrows between them, glaring fixed eyes, tightened lower eyelids, lips pressed thin, jaw clenched

😡.label: furious
😡.positive: explosive fury, face flushed deep red, brows crushed down into a scowl, eyes blazing under tense lids, teeth gritted and bared, nostrils flared, jaw thrust forward

😤.label: steaming
😤.positive: indignant frustration, steam jetting from flared nostrils, chin raised defiantly, brows slammed down, eyes narrowed, mouth clamped in a hard frown

😮.label: surprised
😮.positive: caught by surprise, eyebrows arched high, horizontal forehead creases, eyes rounded with white showing, jaw dropped into a small open oval

😯.label: hushed
😯.positive: hushed astonishment, small round o-shaped mouth, brows lifted, eyes wide and still, face otherwise frozen

😲.label: shocked
😲.positive: outright shock, jaw hanging fully open, mouth gaping, eyebrows shot up to the hairline, eyes bulging with sclera visible all around, face drained

😱.label: screaming
😱.positive: screaming terror, both hands clapped to the cheeks, mouth stretched wide open in a scream, eyes huge and white-rimmed, brows arched to the limit, face pale

😨.label: fearful
😨.positive: rising fear, brows raised and drawn together, upper eyelids lifted high, tense lower lids, lips stretched horizontally, face blanched

😰.label: anxious
😰.positive: cold-sweat anxiety, bead of sweat running down the brow, eyes wide and darting, brows knitted upward, mouth open slightly and trembling

🥵.label: hot
🥵.positive: overheated and flushed, skin red and glistening with sweat, tongue out panting, eyes squinting, brows strained upward

🥶.label: cold
🥶.positive: freezing cold, skin tinged blue, teeth gritted and chattering, jaw trembling, shoulders hunched, eyes pinched nearly shut

🤢.label: nauseated
🤢.positive: queasy nausea, skin tinted sickly green, nose wrinkled up, upper lip raised in revulsion, cheeks bulging, eyes watering and squeezed

😵.label: dizzy
😵.positive: knocked dizzy, spiral swirls for eyes, mouth open and askew, head lolling, brows floating at odd angles

🥴.label: woozy
🥴.positive: woozy tipsy daze, eyelids drooping unevenly, eyes unfocused and misaligned, lopsided wavering half smile, flushed cheeks, brows uneven

😴.label: sleepy
😴.positive: drifting asleep, eyes fully closed and smooth, brows at rest, jaw slack, lips barely parted, every facial muscle released

😪.label: drowsy
😪.positive: heavy drowsiness, eyelids drooping at half mast, a sleep bubble at the nostril, mouth soft and open, head nodding forward

😺.label: cat grin
😺.positive: cartoon cat face with pointed ears and whiskers, wide open cat grin, upper fangs showing, eyes big and bright, whisker pads raised
😺.negative: human ears, no whiskers, plain head

😸.label: cat smile
😸.positive: cartoon cat face with pointed ears and whiskers, eyes closed into happy upturned arcs, mouth a wide contented cat smile, whisker pads high
😸.negative: human ears, no whiskers, plain head

😹.label: cat joy
😹.positive: cartoon cat face with ears and whiskers, laughing with tears streaming from squeezed-shut eyes, mouth wide open showing fangs
😹.negative: human ears, no whiskers, plain head

😻.label: cat love
😻.positive: cartoon cat face with ears and whiskers, big heart-shaped eyes, ears perked forward, blissful open smile, whiskers lifted
😻.negative: human ears, no whiskers, plain head

😼.label: cat smirk
😼.positive: cartoon cat face with ears and whiskers, sly sidelong eyes half-lidded, one corner of the mouth curled up, ears angled back knowingly
😼.negative: human ears, no whiskers, plain head

😽.label: cat kiss
😽.positive: cartoon cat face with ears and whiskers, eyes closed serenely, small puckered kissing mouth, whiskers relaxed forward
😽.negative: human ears, no whiskers, plain head

🙀.label: cat surprised
🙀.positive: cartoon cat face with pointed ears and whiskers, ears flattened sideways, eyes enormous with tiny pupils, mouth agape, whiskers splayed, paws to cheeks
🙀.negative: human ears, no whiskers, calm, plain head

😿.label: cat crying
😿.positive: cartoon cat face with ears and whiskers, single large tear on the cheek, ears drooping low, eyes glossy and downturned, small trembling frown
😿.negative: human ears, no whiskers, plain head, smiling

😾.label: cat pouting
😾.positive: cartoon cat face with ears and whiskers, ears pinned flat back, brows slanted hard down, eyes narrowed to slits, mouth a tight grumpy frown
😾.negative: human ears, no whiskers, plain head, smiling
